name: Vector Memory
description: Adds simple note memory tools backed by Metidos embeddings and plugin-scoped LanceDB storage.

access.name: Memory tools
access.description: Expose vector-backed note memory tools to selected threads.

tools.name: remember_note
tools.description: Embed and store a note in plugin-owned vector memory.

tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Embed a query and search stored vector notes.
